changeSet.author: Eugene A. Kalosha
changeSet.sql:
INSERT INTO data_type_classifications (id, organization_id, name, description, created_by_id, updated_by_id) VALUES (101, 105, 'Privacy', 'All EU Citizen data ', 161, 161) , (102, 105, 'PII', 'All personal identifiable Information', 161, 161) , (103, 105, 'Healthcare', 'All patient and medical data', 161, 161) , (104, 105, 'IP', 'Intellectual Property', 161, 161) , (105, 105, 'Customer Related', 'Customer information', 161, 161) , (106, 105, 'Partner Related', 'Partner information', 161, 161) , (107, 105, 'Credit Card', 'Credit card data including card number, card pin, card security code', 161, 161) , (108, 105, 'Federal', 'Any data provided to or received from the federal government', 161, 161) , (109, 105, 'Patent', 'Patent data', 161, 161) , (110, 105, 'Formula', 'Any type of formula data', 161, 161) , (111, 105, 'Vendor', 'Any 3rd party data', 161, 161) , (112, 105, 'Business Data', 'Any business data', 161, 161) , (113, 105, 'Financial', 'Any financial data', 161, 161) , (114, 105, 'Employee', 'Any employee related data', 161, 161) ;
ALTER SEQUENCE data_type_classifications_id_seq RESTART WITH 1024;
